name: MISRA C++: Mandatory Not Weakened
description: A Mandatory guideline is never re-categorized to a less strict category; only Advisory guidelines may be re-categorized to Disapplied.
rationale: MISRA Compliance:2020: Required and Advisory may be made stricter; Mandatory cannot be loosened, and only Advisory may be re-categorized to Disapplied.

examples.fails: the required compliance artifact/step is absent

source: MISRA Compliance:2020 — Achieving compliance with MISRA Coding Guidelines, applied to MISRA C++:2023. https://misra.org.uk/
